label: false-dup
a: User-level feature flags: specific users can be enrolled in a feature independently. Used for beta testing with specific customers.
b: Organization-level feature flags: enabling a flag for an organization enables it for all users in that organization. Used for staged rollout to enterprise customers.
reviewer_notes: Different flag scopes: A is user-level enrollment (per individual); B is organization-level enrollment (whole tenant). Different rollout patterns.
